nasb.text: He shall bring them to the priest, who shall offer first that which is for the sin offering and shall nip its head at the front of its neck, but he shall not sever it.

esv.text: He shall bring them to the priest, who shall offer first the one for the sin offering. He shall wring its head from its neck but shall not sever it completely,

cnv.text: 他要把牠們帶到祭司那裡，祭司就要先獻上作為贖罪祭的一隻，把鳥的頭從頸項上扭斷，只是不可撕斷。

ccb.text: 他要把它们带到祭司那里，祭司要先用一只鸟献赎罪祭，要扭断鸟脖子，但不可扯掉头。
